title: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ANIMAL AID INC DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a free-roam shelter for cats and a foster program for cats and dogs. Also has cat adoptions and foster-to-adopt dogs. Public surrender intakes are considered on a case by case basis. 5335 SW 42nd Avenue Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Visiting hours for adoptions: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm, Saturday noon-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm. Voicemails and callbacks are not returned on evenings and weekends. Email (503) 292-6628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 292-6628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: No set fees for adoption; donations suggested DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANIMAL AID INC
